---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

## Additional context

If this is about a new device frame, note that frames must be **real PNG photos**
(see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)). Add any references or mockups here.
